import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import axios from "axios"; function EditCategory(props) { const [categoryInput, setCategory] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { const category_id = props.match.params.id; axios.get(`/api/edit/${category_id}`).then(res => { setCategory(); }); }, [props.match.params.id]); const handleInput = (e) => { e.persist(); setCategory({...categoryInput, [e.target.name]: e.target.value}); } return(
